questions.reference_script: Thank you for calling Sunrise Electronics. Our store hours are nine in the morning to eight in the evening, Monday through Saturday. For information about repairs, warranties, or returns, please visit our website or stay on the line to speak with a representative.

Good evening, and welcome to tonight's community meeting. Before we begin, I would like to remind everyone to silence their phones. We have several important topics to discuss, including the new park project and the upcoming summer festival.

questions.prompt: Imagine that a marketing firm is doing research in your area. You have agreed to participate in a telephone interview about reading. How often do you read books, and where do you usually read?
What kind of books do you enjoy reading the most, and why?
Some people say that reading printed books is better than reading on a screen. Do you agree? Give reasons to support your answer.
Hi, this is one of the attendees. I have a few questions about the workshop schedule. What time does the first session start, and what is its topic?
questions.provided_info:
Marketing Strategy Workshop — Saturday, June 20
9:00 AM  Opening Keynote: Trends in Digital Marketing (Room A, Speaker: Dr. Helen Carter)
10:30 AM  Session 1: Social Media Advertising (Room B, Speaker: Mark Lee)
12:00 PM  Lunch (Main Hall)
1:30 PM  Session 2: Email Campaigns (Room B, Speaker: Mark Lee)
3:00 PM  Panel Discussion: Measuring ROI (Room A)
Registration fee: $50 (includes lunch)
